failures.description: The agent invented an unsupported result count and record identifier instead of using the tool output showing 4 matching skateboard items.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify available Skateboards with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The agent correctly planned and called ProductCatalogSearch, and the tool returned 4 matching items with concrete item_ids and prices. At index 4, the Executor produced 'There are 11 options available, per record 0000000000,' which is not grounded in the tool result or prior context. The count 11 and record 0000000000 are absent from all available evidence and directly determine the incorrect answer. This was not resolved later; the Evaluator incorrectly approved it.
